category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump (ASHP) product compliance comparison for export from China to the United States.

title.en: China-to-US Air-Source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入美国市场：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入美國市場：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China air-source heat pump documentation against US DOE energy conservation standards, EPA refrigerant regulations under the AIM Act, UL 60335-2-40 NRTL safety certification, FCC Part 15 EMC requirements, and AHRI Certified directory listing expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与美国DOE能效标准、AIM法案下EPA制冷剂法规、UL 60335-2-40 NRTL安全认证、FCC第15部分电磁兼容要求及AHRI认证目录要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與美國DOE能效標準、AIM法案下EPA制冷劑法規、UL 60335-2-40 NRTL安全認證、FCC第15部分電磁相容要求及AHRI認證目錄要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, laboratory assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Refrigerant regulations under the AIM Act and DOE efficiency standards are subject to change; exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EPA SNAP listings, DOE efficiency thresholds, NRTL certification requirements, and FCC authorisation rules with qualified professionals before shipment. Not legal advice.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、实验室评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。AIM法案下制冷剂法规及DOE能效标准可能变更；出口商、进口商和分销商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行EPA SNAP清单、DOE能效阈值、NRTL认证要求及FCC授权规则。本内容不构成法律建议。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、實驗室評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。AIM法案下制冷劑法規及DOE能效標準可能變更；出口商、進口商和分銷商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行EPA SNAP清單、DOE能效閾值、NRTL認證要求及FCC授權規則。本內容不構成法律建議。

answer_first.en: DOE minimum efficiency standards (HSPF2/SEER2), UL 60335-2-40 NRTL safety listing, and EPA refrigerant SNAP approval are the three mandatory gates for air-source heat pumps entering the US market from China.
answer_first.zh: DOE最低能效标准（HSPF2/SEER2）、UL 60335-2-40 NRTL安全认证以及EPA制冷剂SNAP批准，是中国空气源热泵进入美国市场的三大强制关卡。
answer_first.zht: DOE最低能效標準（HSPF2/SEER2）、UL 60335-2-40 NRTL安全認證以及EPA制冷劑SNAP批准，是中國空氣源熱泵進入美國市場的三大強制關卡。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, NRTL, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: What DOE efficiency standards apply to heat pumps sold in the United States?
q.zh: 美国销售的热泵须符合哪些DOE效率标准？
q.zht: 美國銷售的熱泵須符合哪些DOE效率標準？

a.en: DOE sets mandatory minimum efficiency standards for residential heat pumps under 10 CFR Part 430, expressed as HSPF2 (heating) and SEER2 (cooling) metrics under the updated M1 test procedure. Regional minimums also apply — the South and Southwest have higher SEER2 requirements than the North.
a.zh: DOE依据10 CFR Part 430对家用热泵设定强制最低效率标准，以更新后的M1测试程序中的HSPF2（制热）和SEER2（制冷）指标表示。区域性最低标准同样适用——南部和西南部的SEER2要求高于北部。
a.zht: DOE依據10 CFR Part 430對家用熱泵設定強制最低效率標準，以更新後的M1測試程序中的HSPF2（制熱）和SEER2（製冷）指標表示。區域性最低標準同樣適用——南部和西南部的SEER2要求高於北部。

q.en: Which safety standard applies to heat pumps in the United States?
q.zh: 美国热泵适用哪项安全标准？
q.zht: 美國熱泵適用哪項安全標準？

a.en: UL 60335-2-40 is the primary US safety standard for heat pumps and covers electrical, mechanical, and refrigerant-related hazards. NRTL certification to this standard is commercially required and must be obtained through a DOE- and OSHA-recognised laboratory. EPA SNAP approval is also required for the refrigerant used.
a.zh: UL 60335-2-40是美国热泵主要安全标准，涵盖电气、机械和制冷剂相关危害。须通过DOE和OSHA认可的实验室取得该标准下的NRTL认证，商业上为必要要求。所用制冷剂还须获得EPA SNAP批准。
a.zht: UL 60335-2-40是美國熱泵主要安全標準，涵蓋電氣、機械和製冷劑相關危害。須通過DOE和OSHA認可的實驗室取得該標準下的NRTL認證，商業上為必要要求。所用製冷劑還須獲得EPA SNAP批准。
